{"id":"project-LICHEN-8bzl","title":"PliPayload and ChatPayload dataclasses missing __slots__ - memory overhead","description":"File: python/src/lichen/gateway/compact_cot.py
Lines: 137-148, 186-193

The PliPayload and ChatPayload dataclasses don't use __slots__:
```python
@dataclass
class PliPayload:
    lat_microdeg: int
    lon_microdeg: int
    ...
```

Impact:
1. Each instance has a __dict__, adding ~100+ bytes overhead
2. For high-volume mesh gateways processing many PLI messages, this adds up
3. Slower attribute access compared to slots

Fix: Add slots=True (Python 3.10+):
```python
@dataclass(slots=True)
class PliPayload:
    ...
```

Or for pre-3.10 compatibility:
```python
@dataclass
class PliPayload:
    __slots__ = ('lat_microdeg', 'lon_microdeg', 'alt_dm', 
                 'course_cdeg', 'speed_cm_s', 'team', 'role')
    ...
```

Severity: Low - optimization, not correctness.","status":"open","priority":4,"issue_type":"bug","owner":"me@mark.atwood.name","created_at":"2026-07-12T06:18:20.993344Z","created_by":"Mark Atwood","updated_at":"2026-07-12T06:18:20.993404Z"}
